simple_types.name: CFG_DTOMUL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG_DTOMUL_Field is
   X1,
   X16,
   X128,
   X256,
   X1024,
   X4096,
   X65536,
   X1048576)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: CFG_PAGESIZE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG_PAGESIZE_Field is
   PS512,
   PS1024,
   PS2048,
   PS4096)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_Field is
   PS512,
   PS1024,
   PS2048,
   PS4096)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_Field
simple_types.code:
type ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_Field is
   CPAGE,
   C256B,
   C512B)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: CPAGE
enumeration_literals.description:
1 bit correction for 256 Bytes of data for a page of 512/2048/4096 bytes
(for 8-bit NAND Flash only)

enumeration_literals.name: C256B
enumeration_literals.description:
1 bit correction for 512 Bytes of data for a page of 512/2048/4096 bytes
(for 8-bit NAND Flash only)

simple_types.name: MODE0_DBW_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE0_DBW_Field is
   BIT_8,
   BIT_16)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: MODE0_EXNW_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE0_EXNW_MODE_Field is
   DISABLED,
   FROZEN,
   READY)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MODE0_READ_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE0_READ_MODE_Field is
   NCS_CTRL,
   NRD_CTRL)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NCS_CTRL
enumeration_literals.description: The Read operation is controlled by the NRD signal.

simple_types.name: MODE0_WRITE_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MODE0_WRITE_MODE_Field is
   NCS_CTRL,
   NWE_CTRL)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NCS_CTRL
enumeration_literals.description: The Write operation is controlled by the NWE signal.

simple_types.name: WPCR_WP_KEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPCR_WP_KEY_Field is
   WPCR_WP_KEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPCR_WP_KEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WP_EN bit. Always reads as 0.
